title: Hugging Face adds a one-click path into SageMaker Studio
friendlyTitle: Try a Hugging Face model in Amazon’s AI studio with one click
summary: A new Hugging Face–Amazon deep link sends a selected model directly into the relevant Amazon SageMaker Studio workflow. The environment arrives configured with the model ready for fine-tuning or deployment.
friendlySummary: You can now choose a model on Hugging Face and open it straight in Amazon SageMaker Studio. The model and workspace are set up for you.
whyItMatters: The integration removes setup friction between model discovery and cloud experimentation, which is useful for teams testing open models before committing engineering time.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This saves time for people who want to test or use an AI model without doing lots of setup first.
